description: Disney Tigger plush — sewing and cleaning.
itemDetails:
Disney Tigger plush is licensed Winnie the Pooh character merchandise from Disney's long-established plush programs. Tigger has been issued in many fabric and expression variants, so tags and production details are important for release-era matching.

Most versions use striped polyester plush, embroidered face detailing, and soft fill with a shaped tail. Collector demand is steady for Disney core characters, with stronger value for park/store exclusives and clean, tag-retained examples.
